The Institute of Smelling a Scam Before It Happens credential counter
workshop_pitch: You selected Institutional Enforcer plus Grieving Zealot and got a villain whose favorite workplace protection is permissions. Their primary moral texture is ambient accusation. Their exposure lateral is Hostile Acquisitions and Intimate Takeovers. Their core competency stack is Charisma Fraud. Their formal training comes from The Institute of Smelling a Scam Before It Happens.
opening_image: Fluorescent corridors teach you the rules before anyone speaks them aloud.
dossier_summary: This build runs on sanctioned violence inside a ward. At the story level, it makes the machine legible through procedure. The primary moral texture is ambient accusation. The internal lie is simple: I am just following protocol. The exposure profile is hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers, which operationalized into charisma fraud. Before any grand plan begins, the daily proof of rot is vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person.
public_facing_bio: Publicly, this figure presents as polished, necessary, and strangely inevitable. Privately, they are a pure engine of ambient accusation shaped by hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers and confident enough to treat narrative seizure like a normal leadership behavior.
internal_memo: Internal note: continue protecting the principal from low-level reputation damage tied to vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person. Their current strengths remain narrative seizure, prestige mimicry, staged sincerity. Do not mention the Efficiency Consultant Liaison Office matter in writing, and do not summarize their exposure to hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers in investor-safe language unless legal forces it.
signature_scene: The villain stages a scene inside the ward where permissions briefly passes for order until the room notices too late that the real agenda is this: turns private loss into public doctrine. The room then realizes the villain has professional-grade exposure to hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers and a competency stack built around narrative seizure. Somewhere in the background, they are still the sort of person who would be vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person.
fake_trailer: In a world shaped by corporate satire, one institutional enforcer build will learn that documentation flips from a tool of control into a weapon against the enforcer. Exposure: Hostile Acquisitions and Intimate Takeovers. Core competencies: narrative seizure, prestige mimicry. Certified by The Institute of Smelling a Scam Before It Happens. Somebody is definitely vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person in act one and that should have been the warning.
sequel_slop: Franchise extension: somebody rebuilds the same logic with fresher branding, and the receipts get harder to kill. The petty tell survives too, because evil this scalable still finds time for vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person. So does the exposure trail, which keeps producing the same competency stack: narrative seizure, prestige mimicry.
sample_lines: If vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person bothers you, wait until you see what hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers did for my competencies.
My core competencies include narrative seizure and not explaining myself twice.
If this sounds compassionate, you are already inside the problem.
hooks: The real threat is not violence but the institutional permission structure surrounding it.
Even before the grand scheme, the villain was already the kind of person who would be vaguebooking about some people after being perfectly normal in person.
The audience trusts the build less the moment they learn it graduated from The Institute of Smelling a Scam Before It Happens after years of exposure to hostile acquisitions and intimate takeovers.
